reviews.text: I had such a wonderful experience with Michael! He provided suggestion and ideas on where to take photos, and was so fun to work with. We took photos in Crested Butte, CO during aspen season and he captured such beautiful pictures of my husband and I. Highly recommend getting photos taken by him.

It is nearly impossible to narrow down 1,000 great photos into a handful of examples to illustrate Michael's ability to capture special moments - but if you've been to his website, you've already seen how creative and adventurous he is with his photography!

My husband and I interviewed several photographers and chose Michael because we got the sense that he was going to be able to flow with us and be creative in the moment, not getting hung up on expectations or perfection.  And that's exactly what happened!

We met Michael at a ski resort the day before our wedding and captured some on-mountain action shots, as well as some shots around town.  Michael both guided us and moved at our pace - he didn't have an agenda, he was just there to record and suggest when suggestions were needed.  He was immensely generous with his time, never pressuring us and at the same time gently reminding us how quickly the day was moving.

During our ceremony day, Michael captured everything happening during and around the ceremony.  We got wonderful images of our guests, bridal party, and all of the bits in between.  He had to contend with challenging lighting and occasional snow during our day, and took total advantage of both.  The drone images we received were unexpected and awesome!  We got sneak peaks within the week, and our full set of images showed up quickly thereafter.  The albums were really easy to download into google photo accounts and from there, the sky is the limit for printing or sharing!

We would strongly encourage anyone who is considering an adventurous wedding location to chat with Michael.  He's an explorer with a special knack for recording the moment, and we highly recommend his work!

We had an amazing time working with Michael! He was recommended by our lovely wedding planners after they heard how important the photos were to us and it was the best decision! Michael captured our Crested Butte micro-wedding perfectly even with all the weather (hail, rain, and shine) that CO had to offer. The wildflowers were blooming and Michael knew all the best spots to capture the amazing scenery! He was able to give us great cues as well as capture incredible candids! The pictures came out amazing! We’ll treasure them forever and know we’ll go back to them to relive the memories! Michael was super easy to work with, very relaxed and down to earth but also really professional! We highly recommend hiring Michael to photograph your wedding (or any event / epic adventure)!

My husband, Dan, and I had an amazing time working with Michael. Michael took our engagement photos in Telluride during early July of 2023, and he also photographed our wedding at Granby Ranch in late June of 2024.

Michael's photography captured both the beauty of our mountain setting while also showcasing the emotion and connection between us as a couple. I was so impressed by his work. When we received our wedding photos, we were able to relive the entire day all over again.

Michael is a professional. Right away we felt comfortable working with him. You can tell he's genuinely interested in getting to know the people he's photographing. If you're an LGBT+ couple, I cannot recommend Michael enough, as we instantly felt okay being our true selves around him.

Thank you Michael for capturing our wedding and creating memories we'll always be able to look back on.

My husband and I hired Michael as our wedding photographer and we could not have been happier with our experience. Michael was a pleasure to work with. We had a super fun day with him before the ceremony taking pictures in and around Crested Butte, and his pictures of the wedding itself were amazing. We can't say enough good things about the pictures-they are stunning. Michael is amazing at capturing both intimate wedding moments and incorporating the breathtaking scenery of the Colorado mountains.

Michael was also incredibly accommodating when, due to unforeseen circumstances, we had to postpone our adventure session. He was very flexible and worked with us to reschedule for a few weeks later.

We highly recommend hiring Michael as a wedding photographer!
